events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: the straightedge is the right diagnostic tool and it correctly caught real sheave misalignment — the defect is the misalignment itself, not the check method. Since work is staged (belts not yet installed/tensioned), the fix is to correct alignment (shim/adjust the mount, re-verify with the straightedge across both sheave faces, torque to spec) before installing belts — proceeding straight to belt install without correcting alignment would just reproduce the wear/vibration symptom, so `decision` is `fail`.
